scripts.publish_website: npm run publish_website:docs && npm run publish_website:example
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@fisharmy100/auto-i18n-cli && npm run build --workspace=@fisharmy100/react-auto-i18n
scripts.example: npm run build && npm run dev --workspace=example-website
scripts.publish_npm: npm run build && npx changeset publish
